name: node-define-property
title: node-define-property
description:
Define property on an object
Define a non-enumerable property on an object.
Uses Reflect.defineProperty when available,
otherwise Object.defineProperty, depending on supported
javascript version.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-define-property because Define property on an object.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-define-property as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-define-property with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-define-property --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
